close_reason: Implemented tk sync and tk check subcommands. Created syncer package that uses staleness and syncconfig packages. Sync detects stale files and regenerates them, check reports staleness without modifying files.
description:
Implement `tk sync` subcommand for explicit synchronization.

Behavior:
- Check all staleness rules (deps + BUCK files)
- Regenerate everything that's stale
- Report what was regenerated
- Exit 0 if successful

Useful for:
- Initial project setup
- Manual sync when needed
- Debugging sync issues

Output example:
```
tk sync
Checking go-deps.toml... stale (go.mod newer)
  Regenerating go-deps.toml... done
Checking examples/go-hello/BUCK... ok
Checking examples/go-hello-deps/BUCK... ok
Synced 1 file(s)
```
title: tk sync: Explicit sync subcommand
